# Test refresh command validation
# The refresh command refreshes authentication credentials
# Requires: no arguments (it manages its own auth)
# Note: This command does NOT require prior authentication (it refreshes credentials)

# === REFRESH COMMAND ===
# Test refresh with no arguments (should not require prior auth)
# It will fail without stored credentials, but should give helpful error
! exec ./nlm_test refresh
stderr 'no stored credentials'
! stderr 'panic'
! stderr 'Authentication required for'

# Test refresh accepts optional -debug flag
! exec ./nlm_test -debug refresh
stderr 'no stored credentials'
! stderr 'panic'
! stderr 'Authentication required for'

# Note: The refresh command manages its own authentication and does not
# require prior auth credentials. It fails gracefully without stored credentials.
